headline: Bandung flood disrupts major roads
summary: Banjir di Kota Bandung menyebabkan genangan dan gangguan lalu lintas di beberapa ruas utama.
summary_id: Banjir di Kota Bandung menyebabkan genangan dan gangguan lalu lintas di beberapa ruas utama.
summary_en: Flooding in Bandung caused standing water and traffic disruption along several primary roads.
